name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Created
notes: This Building Block defines virtual machine creation events.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Virtual Machine Creation Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Creation Success
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Virtual Machine Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Audit.Virtual Machine Creation Attempt, Audit.Virtual Machine Creation Success
